name: Acquire Asset
description: The end-to-end perspective of acquiring an asset, from initiating and approving the asset request, to sourcing and processing procurement orders and delivering the asset to the requester.

name: Request Asset
description: The act of submitting a request for a new asset.

name: Approve Request
description: The act of validating that the asset request meets the procurement, financial, and business justification criteria.

name: Source Supplier
description: The act of evaluating and selecting the supplier for the asset.

name: Finalize Partner Agreement
description: The act of establishing or updating an agreement with the selected supplier.

name: Place Order
description: The act of placing a procurement order to acquire the asset.

name: Receive Asset
description: The act of fulfilling the order, receiving the asset, and accounting for the asset.

name: Acquire Coverage
description: The end-to-end perspective of obtaining coverage to indemnify against loss.

name: Initiate Interest
description: The act of expressing a desire to purchase coverage.

name: Approve Application
description: The act of validating that the coverage applied for is appropriate to meet the needs of the constituent.

name: Underwrite Risk
description: The act of reviewing the application to determine if the risk factors will be accepted prior to offering coverage.

name: Accept Offer
description: The act of accepting an offer for coverage as presented by the insurer.

name: Finalize Coverage
description: The act of obtaining the consent to the costs associated with providing coverage.

name: Arrange License
description: The end-to-end perspective of applying for, qualifying for, and receiving a new or renewal of a license or permit.

name: Receive Application
description: Applicant completes and submits application with supporting documentation as required for the type of license requested.

name: Accept Application
description: Determine if the application is complete and ready to be evaluated, e.g., all required information is present in the application.

name: Evaluate Application
description: Evaluate the match between the criteria for the specific type of license criteria and the data on the application.

name: Issue License
description: Perform the steps necessary to inform the applicant and initiate the delivery of the license artifact to the applicant.

name: Finalize Application
description: Complete the recording of the decision for audit trail, inform other agencies, organizations as appropriate, process fees associated with the licensing process.

name: Conduct Audit
description: The end-to-end perspective of determining the degree to which the organization is adhering to established policies and regulations.

name: Request Audit
description: The act of requesting an audit.

name: Plan Audit
description: The act of identifying the audit scope, including procedures, controls, measures, and execution plan.

name: Gather Audit Information
description: The act of discovering information pertinent to the audit scope.

name: Analyze Audit Information
description: The act of evaluating the information needed for the audit.

name: Document Audit Report
description: The act of compiling the results of the audit.

name: Publish Audit Report
description: The act of publishing the audit.

name: Conduct Investigation
description: The end-to-end perspective of determining the degree to which the individual or organization is adhering to established policies and regulations, such as for financial, tax, or election violation probes.

name: Launch Investigation
description: The act of initiating an investigation.

name: Plan Investigation
description: The activities required to determine the investigation scope, e.g., actors, trading activities, relationships, and produce an execution plan.

name: Determine Investigation Outcome
description: The activities required to discover, gather, and analyze information pertinent to the investigation scope.

name: Confirm Investigation Outcome
description: The act of compiling the results of the investigation.

name: Finalize Investigation
description: The act of disseminating investigation outcome and making recommendations.

name: Conduct Research
description: The end-to-end perspective of setting scope, determining study means, designing the study, gathering research, producing findings, and delivering recommendations.

name: Establish Research Topic
description: Capture of request and determination of a qualified topic to research.

name: Determine Research Methodology
description: Design research method and identify tools and approach.

name: Finalize Plan
description: Draft plan, identify dependencies, obtain funding and authorization, and target subjects and providers.

name: Gather Research
description: Gather information identified in research plan.

name: Develop Findings
description: Formalization of research study findings.

name: Develop Recommendations
description: Complete recommendations, align to findings, and finalize study to allow readers to draw a conclusion.

name: Conduct Vote
description: The end-to-end perspective of planning and executing the means, typically by ballot, to establish the constituents' choice for, or re-call of, a particular candidate(s), proposition, plebiscite, or referendum question.

name: Initiate Vote
description: The activities required to conceive, advance, posit, or originate a vote on a proposition, referendum, and/or election.

name: Approve Vote Plan
description: The activities required to identify propositions, referendum questions, register eligible candidates, election representatives and constituents as voters, schedule voting-related events, identify and deploy resources, book voting venues, address security concerns, and finalize the plan to conduct a vote.

name: Prepare to Conduct Vote
description: The activities required to enable the voting to occur, including updating the electoral register, preparing fiscal analysis of propositions, registering candidates and election representatives, issuing voting invitation cards, ensuring the safety of voters and the data integrity of the votes, collecting proxy and postal votes, monitoring candidate campaigns, advertising polling stations locations, and preparing the polling stations.

name: Collect and Aggregate Vote
description: The activities required to manage voting and counting operations, including vote casting, securing, transporting, preparing votes for counting, checking and recounting as needed, and generally ensuring the integrity of the vote casting and count.

name: Finalize Vote Outcome
description: The activities required to certify the integrity of the voting process, formalize the outcome, and declare the results.

name: Create Policy
description: The end-to-end perspective involved in the creation or update of policies that govern how the public sector entity will regulate constituent organizations, including the operations of the public sector entity itself.

name: Initiate Policy Request
description: The initiation of a policy creation or modification as a result of a request.

name: Approve Policy Request
description: The collection and analysis of research leading to an approval or denial to proceed with policy formulation.

name: Formulate Policy
description: The drafting of a proposed policy or policy modification, collecting comments, editing, and finalizing the policy to submit for review.

name: Approve Policy
description: The official review and legally binding vote by authorized persons to establish the creation or modification of a policy.

name: Publish Policy
description: The publication of the new or modified policy for consumption by organizations, institutions, partners, and other stakeholders.

name: Cross Geographic Border
description: The end-to-end perspective of crossing or sending something across a geographic border.

name: Initiate Geographic Border Crossing
description: Research crossing criteria, apply for permission to cross geographic border.

name: Receive Permissions
description: Obtain permissions to leave jurisdiction of crossing origin.

name: Depart Origin Jurisdiction
description: Begin crossing from origin jurisdiction to target jurisdiction.

name: Receive Permission to Enter Target Jurisdiction
description: Obtain permits to enter target jurisdiction.

name: Enter Target Jurisdiction
description: Arrive at target jurisdiction.

name: Decide Legal Case
description: The end-to-end perspective of bringing a case, evidence, and testimony through the court system, obtaining a decision, and enacting the decision.

name: File Legal Case
description: According to the customs of the jurisdiction, present a claim to the right to pursue a legal matter to obtain a resolution.

name: Prepare for Case Examination
description: The activities required by the jurisdiction to prepare for a formal examination of the evidence of the case.

name: Conduct Case Examination
description: Optional value stream stage in which the activities required by the jurisdiction to present evidence for a legal case are conducted.

name: Determine Case Outcome
description: The activities at the end of a formal examination that result in a decision.

name: Finalize Legal Case
description: The post-trial activities to record the outcome, expectations, and next steps, if any.

name: Deliver Initiative
description: The end-to-end perspective of planning and executing an initiative.

name: Request Initiative
description: The act of requesting that an initiative be commenced.

name: Create Initiative Plan
description: The act of defining the program plan, including program budget and schedule.

name: Approve Initiative Plan
description: The act of approving the program plan.

name: Resource Initiative
description: The act of securing program resources, including money, people, and assets.

name: Execute Initiative
description: The act of performing the work defined in the program.

name: Finalize Initiative
description: The act of evaluating program metrics and transferring ownership to the sponsoring organization(s).

name: Deliver Meeting
description: The end-to-end perspective of planning and executing a meeting.

name: Initiate Meeting
description: The act of conceiving, advancing, positing, or originating a meeting.

name: Approve Meeting
description: The act of defining the meeting and its subject matter, planning the meeting, budgeting and scheduling the meeting, identifying resources for the meeting, and approving the meeting.

name: Prepare Meeting
description: The act of securing resources, such as people, assets, or facilities for the meeting.

name: Conduct Meeting
description: The act of carrying out the activities defined in the meeting plan.

name: Finalize Meeting
description: The act of concluding the meeting, which may include activities such as communicating with stakeholders after a meeting, recording or memorializing the meeting subject matter, evaluating the outcomes of the meeting, paying for the meeting, or cleaning up after the meeting.

name: Deliver Training
description: The end-to-end perspective of planning, executing, and communicating a training course for the purpose of increasing knowledge and skill.

name: Request Training
description: The act of requesting a unit or curriculum of a training course.

name: Define Training Plan
description: The act of identifying training course curriculum options to be delivered to meet the learning, schedule, and budget objectives, and finalizing a plan to proceed.

name: Prepare for Training Delivery
description: The act of scheduling, making arrangements for, resourcing, staging, and readying a training course, according to plan, to prepare for delivery.

name: Orchestrate Training Delivery
description: The act of imparting a training course and validating that it has been understood.

name: Finalize Post-Delivery Actions
description: The act of evaluating a training course learning content and training event delivery metrics and making that information available to appropriate stakeholders.

name: Deploy Asset
description: The end-to-end perspective of making an asset available for use within the organization and to the individual(s) requesting the asset.

name: Receive Request
description: The act of receiving the request for installation or maintenance of an asset.

name: Validate Request
description: The act of authenticating and verifying a request received for asset.

name: Evaluate Asset
description: The act of assessing performance or suitability of asset.

name: Configure Asset
description: The act of initializing, setting up, creating, assembling, validating, or repairing asset in preparation for deployment.

name: Activate Asset
description: The act of making the asset ready for use and closing the request.

name: Deploy Government Service
description: The end-to-end perspective involved in creating and launching a new or modifying or decommissioning an existing government service.

name: Conceptualize Government Service
description: The activities of envisioning and articulating a new or modified government service based on market research, competitive analysis, customer input, and other insights.

name: Design and Create Government Service
description: The activities of designing, test marketing a government service concept, establishing appropriate pricing and profitability models, creating the government service and everything required to support it.

name: Launch Government Service
description: The activities conducted at appropriate scale, e.g., including a pilot test, to mitigate risk, test, verify, and make the government service available to all applicable delivery channels.

name: Assess Government Service Deployment Success
description: The activities of verifying and assessing the performance of the government service deployment.

name: Deploy Infrastructure
description: The end-to-end perspective of planning, specifying, designing, and commissioning major or minor modifications to infrastructure, including roads, railways, bridges, tunnels, stations, rail corridors, and related structures.

name: Initiate Infrastructure Change
description: The act of requesting new or updated infrastructure.

name: Define Infrastructure Change
description: The act of defining infrastructure changes, aligned to policies and analyzed trends, producing conceptual designs and plans, and gaining appropriate approval.

name: Award Contract
description: The act of tendering and awarding a contract to carry out the work.

name: Produce Designs and Specifications
description: The act of producing detailed designs and specifications for an infrastructure update.

name: Create Coordinated Schedule
description: The act of assessing and agreeing to the best options for scheduling so as to minimize disruptive impacts.

name: Construct and Validate Infrastructure
description: The act of building to agreed designs in accordance with agreed standards and constraints, assuring that the infrastructure meets with those designs and policy and is fit to be brought into service.

name: Bring Infrastructure into Use
description: The act of opening the infrastructure to use.

name: Develop Human Resource Career
description: The end-to-end perspective of developing an individual's career, from performance assessment to skills and experience enhancement and individual redeployment.

name: Initiate Career Evaluation
description: The act of initiating the evaluation of an individual, triggered either by the individual or their manager.

name: Evaluate Human Resource
description: The act of assessing the individual's skills and abilities, identifying potential career opportunities, and defining development plans to support those opportunities.

name: Develop Human Resource
description: The act of supporting the individual to execute their development plan and achieve the skills and experience required to meet desired career opportunities.

name: Transition Human Resource
description: The act of transitioning the individual into the desired career opportunity, along with adjustment of compensation and rewards as needed.

name: Develop Strategy
description: The end-to-end perspective of developing or refining a set of integrated and aligned visions, goals, objectives, and courses of action that provide direction and guides activity.

name: Initiate Strategy Formulation
description: The act of commencing a development or refinement of a strategy based on a given business situation or opportunity.

name: Develop Strategy Scope
description: The act of determining the purpose and constraints of the strategy through articulation of vision and goals.

name: Finalize Objectives
description: The act of formulating objectives and associated key metrics.

name: Finalize Strategy
description: The act of validating, finalizing, and disseminating the strategy, which includes determining courses of action, related constraints, and desired outcomes.

name: Disseminate Information
description: The end-to-end perspective of requesting, creating, and delivering of information products to requester.

name: Request Information
description: The act of requesting information.

name: Source Information
description: The act of identifying the sources of information required to fulfill the request.

name: Process Information
description: The act of creating the information product by extracting, transforming, loading, and aggregating the sources of information as needed, as well as validating its quality.

name: Package Information
description: The act of preparing information for consumption.

name: Deliver Information
description: The act of delivering information to requester.

name: Ensure Policy Compliance
description: The end-to-end perspective of ensuring conformance with legislation and organization-driven policies, from identifying compliance requirements, implementing controls, evaluating controls' effectiveness, addressing compliance incidents, and reporting compliance as required.

name: Identify Policy Compliance Requirements
description: The act of identifying compliance requirements, either through legislation, organizational policy creation, or maintenance.

name: Define Policy Compliance Controls
description: The act of analyzing compliance requirements and identifying safeguards and controls to be put in place to ensure compliance.

name: Implement Policy Compliance Controls
description: The act of implementing people, process, and technology changes and required training to enable the predefined compliance controls.

name: Validate Policy Compliance Controls
description: The act of evaluating compliance controls' effectiveness and proactively managing compliance incidents, including disciplinary actions if required.

name: Report Policy Compliance
description: The act of reporting compliance to the regulatory bodies and organization's management.

name: Establish Agreement
description: The end-to-end perspective of activities necessary for establishing a new or updating an existing agreement with a partner or a constituent.

name: Receive Request
description: The act of receiving a request or expressed interest in creating or updating an agreement and verifying the requester's identity.

name: Identify Needs
description: The act of assessing the needs of the constituent in order to recommend the agreement.

name: Collect Approval and Submission
description: The act of receiving the requester's approval to proceed as well as gathering and validating all remaining information needed to establish or modify an agreement.

name: Evaluate Risk
description: The act of both parties, e.g., the requester and the business, assessing the risk of establishing or updating the agreement and agreeing to proceed.

name: Activate Agreement
description: The act of activating the requester's agreement.

name: Perform Post-activation Activities
description: The act of performing any post-activation activities, such as notifications, compliance verification, or quality assurance checks.

name: Establish Standard
description: The end-to-end perspective of designing, articulating, approving, updating, and publishing a standard.

name: Initiate Standard
description: Assess need for new standard, such as to provide guidance for minimum viable compliance with a policy.

name: Commission Standard
description: The act of commissioning the development of a new standard in accordance with organizational or government policy and legislation.

name: Research Industry Practices
description: The act of discovering and evaluating industry practices in order to establish a common framework that will ensure compliance.

name: Articulate Standard
description: The activities involved in drafting the standard, soliciting feedback, and refining the standard.

name: Approve Standard
description: The activities involved to approve the standard for use.

name: Publish Standard
description: The act of publishing the standard to make it available for use.

name: Execute Campaign
description: The end-to-end perspective of executing a campaign, from identifying the need for a campaign, to planning, designing, implementing, and measuring the effectiveness of the campaign.

name: Request Campaign
description: The act of submitting a request for a campaign.

name: Plan Campaign
description: The act of defining a campaign plan, including campaign targets and message, delivery channels, implementation schedule, success criteria, and required campaign budget and resources.

name: Design Campaign
description: The act of defining campaign collateral, including target-specific messaging, graphic designs for each delivery channel.

name: Implement Campaign
description: The act of delivering campaign content as planned.

name: Evaluate Campaign
description: The act of measuring effectiveness of a campaign and identifying possible optimizations for future execution.

name: Execute Financial Transaction
description: The end-to-end perspective involved in completing a financial transaction for an agreement.

name: Initiate Transaction
description: The act of requesting financial activity on an agreement.

name: Validate Transaction Request
description: The act of ensuring that the requester has authority to request the transaction and the agreement is in a valid state to allow the transaction to occur.

name: Identify Related Impacts
description: The act of identifying all related effects of the transaction, including, for example, fees and charges.

name: Perform Transaction
description: The act of applying request changes to the agreement balance and calculating the new agreement balance.

name: Notify Stakeholders
description: The act of notifying all stakeholders of the transaction and related events.

name: Verify Compliance
description: The act of ensuring that processed transactions are recorded and retained in accordance with organization and regulatory policy.

name: Execute Operation
description: The end-to-end perspective of planning, initiating, running, and terminating an operation.

name: Plan Operation
description: The act of planning and rostering an operation instance.

name: Start Operation
description: The act of provisioning and initiating an instance of an operation.

name: End Operation
description: The act of managing and optimizing an operation while it is running.

name: Close Out Operation
description: The act of demobilizing and evaluating an instance of an operation.

name: Manufacture Product
description: The end-to-end value delivery perspective for creating a ready-to-acquire product.

name: Initiate Manufacturing Cycle
description: The initiation of the product manufacturing cycle.

name: Assemble Product
description: The work associated with creating an assembled but not fully packaged product.

name: Package Product
description: The work associated with preparing a product for market, including trim, documentation, other readiness.

name: Deploy Product
description: The final point at which a packaged product is deployed for customer access or acquisition.

name: Obtain Accreditation
description: The end-to-end perspective of applying for, qualifying for, and receiving a new or renewal of a certification.

name: Receive Application
description: Applicant completes and submits application with supporting documentation as required for the type of accreditation requested.

name: Accept Application
description: Determine if the application is complete and ready to be evaluated, e.g., all required information is present in the application.

name: Evaluate Application
description: Evaluate the match between the criteria for the specific type of accreditation criteria and the data on the application.

name: Issue License
description: Perform the steps necessary to inform the applicant and initiate the delivery of the certification artifact to the applicant.

name: Finalize Application
description: Complete the recording of the decision for audit trail, inform other agencies, organizations as appropriate, process fees associated with the accreditation process.

name: Obtain Financial Assistance
description: The end-to-end perspective of a government organization receiving a request for, approving, and providing financial assistance.

name: Submit Request
description: An external party identifies a need for assistance, investigates options, creates a request for assistance, and submits the request to the government organization.

name: Approve Request
description: The government organization receives and reviews the request and decides whether to approve.

name: Establish Agreement
description: The organization works with stakeholders to establish and approve both the agreement and its delivery plan.

name: Deliver Assistance
description: Financial assistance is delivered to the requester as per the agreement and plan.

name: Appraise Service
description: A review is conducted of the financial assistance, covering the design of the service, its delivery, and the outcomes are delivered for the constituent.

name: Obtain Government Service
description: The end-to-end perspective of submitting a request, being qualified for, and receiving the requested service.

name: Submit Request
description: Applicant or their proxy completes and submits application with supporting documentation as required for the type of government service requested.

name: Accept Request
description: Determine whether all required information is present in the application, evaluate the match between the criteria for the specific type of government service and the applicant's qualifications as represented in the application data.

name: Establish Agreement
description: Establish and approve the service agreement and its delivery plan, complete the recording of the decision for audit trail, inform other agencies and organizations as appropriate, process fees associated with transaction processing.

name: Deliver Government Service
description: The act of providing the approved government service to the constituent using a delivery method most appropriate for the type of service and the requester's circumstances.

name: Appraise Service
description: A review is conducted of the government service, covering the design of the service, its delivery, and the outcomes delivered for the constituent.

name: Obtain Land Rights
description: The end-to-end perspective of establishing the right to own, use, and develop government-owned, community-owned, or privately-owned land.

name: Accept Request
description: Ensure conformity of required documentation identifying the requester, establishing the right of the requester to apply for use of the requested land, and describing the envisioned use of the land.

name: Delimit and Demarcate Geographic Space
description: Survey and confirm with local communities the parcel location on authoritative maps.

name: Produce Proposal
description: The activities required to assess stakeholder positions and arrive at an agreement of ownership of land rights.

name: Finalize Decision
description: The activities of review and disposition of the proposal by appropriate decision-making authority, communicating the decision, making payments, registering and publishing the land rights in the official record of the jurisdiction.

name: Onboard Human Resource
description: The end-to-end perspective of identifying, exploring, and selecting an individual to fill a need within an organization.

name: Request Position
description: The act of submitting a recruitment requisition for a vacancy required to perform work for the organization.

name: Validate Position
description: The act of verifying that the recruitment requisition's financial and business justification criteria are acceptable.

name: Source Individuals
description: The act of finding individuals who may qualify for the open position and validating their interest.

name: Evaluate Individuals
description: The act of assessing the potential candidates against the open position requirements and extending an offer to the most qualified individual.

name: Finalize Acceptance
description: The act of negotiating the employment agreement terms and conditions.

name: Onboard Individual
description: The act of bringing an individual into the organization and providing necessary training and resources for them to effectively start contributing.

name: Onboard Partner
description: The end-to-end perspective of identifying and commencing business with other organizations for mutual benefit.

name: Identify Need
description: The act of defining the business requirements for goods and services that cannot be obtained internally.

name: Vet Potential Partner
description: The act of validating that the potential partner is capable of delivering on the value proposition and meets ethical guidelines.

name: Negotiate Terms
description: The act of reviewing and negotiating the terms of the contract including such things as cost, scope, and length of engagement.

name: Formalize Agreement
description: The act of reaching final agreement on the terms of the contract.

name: Induct Partner
description: The act of onboarding the partner to make them familiar with how they are expected to engage with the organization.

name: Optimize Investments
description: The end-to-end perspective of deciding where to make investments, based on the understanding of the enterprise's goals, strategy, current positions, and external forces.

name: Initiate Investment Review
description: The act of understanding the strategy and goals of the enterprise.

name: Assess Current Position
description: The act of gathering and analyzing all relevant information related to transformation of financial and customer goals and objectives.

name: Investigate Investment Options
description: The act of recognizing, designing, evaluating, and prioritizing actions in accordance with strategy, cause-and-effect linkages, and policies and regulations.

name: Select Investment Options
description: The act of selecting a course of action based on assessment of options.

name: Execute Investment Options
description: The act of putting an investment plan in motion.

name: Optimize Reserves
description: The end-to-end perspective of establishing a stated amount or percent of liquid assets that the government estimates as needed on hand for unearned premium reserves and outstanding losses, such as claims and related outstanding liabilities.

name: Create Reserves Forecast
description: The action of making assumptions about future financial trends using techniques such as analysis of historical data, benchmarking, and budgetary planning.

name: Analyze Risks
description: The act of defining and evaluating the uncertainty concerning the possibility of loss to the organization.

name: Determine Risk Exposure
description: The act of quantifying a potential loss to the organization.

name: Establish Target Levels
description: The act of determining the required levels of reserves that will keep the organization financially able to meet its obligations and liabilities.

name: Notify Stakeholders
description: The act of completing activities that will inform the stakeholders of the organization's plan for reserve management.

name: Pass Legislation
description: The end-to-end perspective of drafting a bill, consideration and revision, and approval of the legislation, enactment into law, and possible nullification of outdated laws.

name: Initiate Legislation
description: Act of proposing and beginning the effort to pass legislation.

name: Draft Legislation
description: Act of drafting the initially proposed legislation.

name: Approve Legislation
description: Act of holding hearings, passing through multiple committee, legislative bodies, reconciliations, and achieving final vote to be signed.

name: Sign Legislation
description: Act of formally signing legislation into law, typically by an executive body.

name: Enact Legislation
description: Act of preparing for and having the legislation go into effect.

name: Register-Grant IP Rights
description: The end-to-end perspective of requesting a patent, trademark, or copyright, reviewing the request, and granting the request.

name: Initiate Intellectual Property Rights Request
description: Act of submitting an application to register or grant rights.

name: Accept Request
description: Act of accepting an application as valid.

name: Grant Preliminary Request
description: Act of preliminarily registering or granting of rights, pending public review.

name: Clear Public Review Period
description: Act of opening up a registration or granting request for public review and review period expiring without a challenge.

name: Register/Grant Intellectual Property Rights
description: Act of formally granting or registering intellectual property and notifying all stakeholders.

name: Resolve Dispute
description: The end-to-end perspective of activities related to reaching settlement of the dispute among one or more third parties.

name: Receive Dispute Submission
description: Act of receiving and accepting dispute submission.

name: Validate Dispute
description: Act of determining that the dispute is valid and in the jurisdiction of the government entity.

name: Determine Dispute Outcome
description: Act of settling the dispute.

name: Finalize Dispute Resolution Actions
description: Act of taking any actions required to conform to the settlement terms.

name: Resolve Incident
description: The end-to-end perspective of activities necessary to identify, scope, track, and address an incident as well as identify areas of improvement in order to reduce future likelihood or improve future responses.

name: Recognize Incident
description: The act of identifying and acknowledging an incident.

name: Determine Cause and Impact
description: The act of classifying and investigating the incident to determine the root cause and impact.

name: Formulate Response
description: The act of formulating a course of action to correct or offset the effects of the incident.

name: Conclude Incident
description: The act of applying the determined course of action to resolve, correct or offset the effects of the incident.

name: Identify Improvements
description: The act of deciding on changes to products and/or operational processes to prevent or reduce future recurrence or improve future resolution.

name: Resolve Inquiry
description: The end-to-end perspective necessary to track and resolve a question, request, feedback, or comment.

name: Initiate Inquiry
description: The act of capturing, identifying, recording and acknowledging an inquiry.

name: Accept Inquiry
description: The act of evaluating and comprehending the inquiry and determining whether to respond.

name: Respond to Inquiry
description: The act of formulating an approved response and delivering to the inquiring stakeholder.

name: Identify Improvements
description: The act of deciding on changes to products and/or operational processes to prevent or reduce future recurrence or improve future resolution.

name: Respond to Emergency
description: The end-to-end perspective of identifying, scoping, mobilizing, and otherwise responding to an emergency incident.

name: Identify Emergency
description: The act of identifying an incident that requires an emergency response or being notified that an emergency response is in progress that may be joined.

name: Design Emergency Response
description: The act of identifying a way of optimizing the speed, reliability, and effectiveness of the emergency response.

name: Activate Emergency Response
description: The act of prioritizing, where feasible, the emergency response through the network.

name: Finalize Emergency Response
description: The act of maintaining oversight of an emergency response and finalizing response.

name: Closeout Emergency and Evaluate
description: The act of terminating and evaluating an emergency response.

name: Settle Claim
description: The end-to-end perspective of determining to compensate for, or restoration of, an asset for a loss.

name: Notify Insurer
description: The act of notifying the insuring that an incident has occurred and establishing a claim.

name: Validate Claim
description: The act of determining if the incident recorded meets the criteria needed to process the claim.

name: Adjudicate Claim
description: The act of determining who and how the claim will be resolved and the expected cost to the organization.

name: Resolve Claim
description: The act of meeting the conditions of the policy.

name: Settle Migration
description: The end-to-end perspective of requesting, qualifying for, and receiving authorization for immigration or emigration.

name: Receive Migration Request
description: Applicant completes and submits a migration request, using available channels, with supporting documentation as required for the type of immigration product requested, and completing payment for any required product/service fees.

name: Accept Request for Migration
description: The activities required to perform a detailed assessment of the application, verify and validate the information and supporting documentation provided, and confirm the applicant's identity.

name: Decide Migration Request Outcome
description: The activities required to evaluate the request against eligibility, suitability, entitlement, and threat criteria, interview the migrant applicant where necessary, liaise and communicate with stakeholders as required, arrive at a decision and complete the recording of the decision for case history.

name: Finalize Migration Request Outcome
description: The activities required to produce and complete any required documentation and artifacts relating to the migration determination, deliver the service to the migrant, and communicate the outcome to other agencies and stakeholders.

name: Settle Payment Obligation
description: The end-to-end set of activities necessary for determining, communicating, and settling, i.e., exchanging funds against a payment obligation.

name: Initiate Payment
description: The act of initiating a payment obligation.

name: Determine Payment Obligation
description: The act of gathering and validating all information necessary and calculating and defining a payment obligation.

name: Communicate Payment Obligation
description: The act of formulating and communicating the payment obligation to the appropriate stakeholder(s).

name: Validate Payment Obligation
description: The act of reconciling and validating the legitimacy and accuracy of the payment obligation.

name: Exchange Funds
description: The act of transferring funds against the payment obligation.

name: Update Financial Records
description: The act of recording the exchange of funds in financial accounts and updating the status of the payment obligation.

name: Trade Financial Instrument
description: The end-to-end perspective of executing a financial instrument trade, including clearing and settlement.

name: Initiate Trade
description: The act of making a request for trading a financial instrument.

name: Select Accredited Broker-Dealer
description: The act of determining and selecting which broker-dealer will execute the financial instrument trade.

name: Validate Trade Request
description: The act of verifying if the requested financial instrument is suitable for the investor according to established investment goals.

name: Obtain Trade Quotes
description: The act of obtaining all available quotes for the requested instrument exchange.

name: Execute Trade Order
description: The act of fulfilling, i.e., entering into an agreement with the counterparty to exchange the instrument, the trade order externally and matching to the investment trade agreements.

name: Settle Trade
description: The act of exchanging the agreed-upon financial instruments and verifying that the trade was done in accordance with all policies, regulations, and procedures.
